subject: Re: The dautoalign4warp didn't generate the xf file
body:
Hi Yuqi,

Can you check the tiltalign.stdout file, it probably contains a message about an illegal option passed to tiltalign (-UnbinnedPixelSize) - this option was present in the later beta versions of IMOD 4.10.X, is not present in the current stable version (4.11.X) but is again present in the beta versions (4.12.X). This is (I think) because of an ongoing transition to the use of physical units in IMOD.

The simplest solution is to upgrade to IMOD 4.12.X and rerun - alternatively you can remove the -UnbinnedPixelSize option from the tiltalign_wrapper.sh script in your autoalign_dynamo installation and rerun

https://github.com/alisterburt/autoalign_dynamo/blob/00c33d8d4cb7fe06e8c90a8c75a953115bd18484/autoalign/tiltalign_wrapper.sh#L35 <https://github.com/alisterburt/autoalign_dynamo/blob/00c33d8d4cb7fe06e8c90a8c75a953115bd18484/autoalign/tiltalign_wrapper.sh#L35>

Sorry about that, remaining compatible various ever-improving softwares is tricky. It’s worth noting that checking the various output files files (like the tiltalign.stdout) and information about which versions the software was tested against (available in the README https://github.com/alisterburt/autoalign_dynamo <https://github.com/alisterburt/autoalign_dynamo>) can be useful for solving these types of issues yourself!

Cheers and good luck,

Alister

> On 22 May 2021, at 11:27, yuqi zhang <824586412@qq.com> wrote:
> 
> The dautoalign4warp didn't generate the xf file with the tutorial in https://teamtomo.org/walkthrough/EMPIAR-10164/
> 
> The generate files in folder dynamo_alignments/TS_??.mrc:
> info/         taSolution.log    TS_54.mrc.mod     workingMarkers.dms
> nominal.tlt  tiltalign.stdout  TS_54.mrc.rawtlt
> 
> I did not know how to deal with that?
> 
> --
